meta.title: How It Works — Earn Money With Surveys | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: From sign-up to payout: see exactly how InsightPanel matches you with surveys, pays fair rewards, and cashes you out in minutes.
meta.ogAlt: How InsightPanel works, from opinion to payout

hero.subtitle: Every step respects your time: transparent rewards up front, quick surveys, and payouts that land fast. Here's exactly how it works.

steps.title: Create your profile
steps.text: Sign up free with an email. Answer a short profile survey once — it powers every match after.

steps.title: Get matched
steps.text: We surface surveys you're likely to qualify for, each showing exact time and reward before you tap in.

steps.title: Answer & submit
steps.text: Most surveys run 3–8 minutes. Screened out early? You're never penalized — just try the next one.

steps.title: Get paid
steps.text: Reward lands in your balance instantly. Cash out to PayPal or gift cards from just $5.

surveyPreview.title: What a survey actually looks like

items.title: Bank transfer — 1–2 days
items.text: Direct to your account, zero fees

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.subtitle: It's free, it takes a minute, and your first payout could be today.
